16 class ManualUpdateGeometryPolicy
17  : public IGeometryPolicy
18 {
19 public:
21  ManualUpdateGeometryPolicy()
22  : IGeometryPolicy()
23  , m_current_context(0) { }
24 
26  virtual ~ManualUpdateGeometryPolicy() {}
27 
28 public:
29  virtual Int64 context() { return m_current_context; }
30 
31  virtual void beginContext() { }
32 
33  virtual void endContext() { }
34 
35 public:
36  void updateContext() { ++m_current_context; }
37 
38 private:
39  Int64 m_current_context;
40 };
